concerns.text: FR-004 mandates Linear Mixed-Effects Model (LMM) as the PRIMARY analysis method. Tasks T029a, T030a, and T031a incorrectly prioritize Repeated-Measures ANOVA as primary and relegate LMM to secondary validation. No task exists to implement LMM as the primary method per spec.

FR-008 requires ≥3 independent annotators for ambiguity coding. Task T015a enforces only ≥2 annotators and blocks if unavailable. No task covers the mandatory 3-annotator requirement or majority vote resolution.
FR-001 and US-001 mandate CLIP cosine similarity ≥0.95 for semantic preservation. Task T017 substitutes YOLOv8n IoU >0.95. No task implements the required CLIP verification.
FR-008 specifies Cohen's κ ≥0.6 for ambiguity acceptance. Task T015 implements κ ≥0.8. No task covers the spec's lower threshold.
SC-005 defines precision threshold ≤0.3 for CI width. Task T046 sets MIN_PRECISION = 0.1. No task implements the spec's 0.3 threshold.
FR-001 requires pilot human manipulation check (≥80% agreement on narrative preservation). No task explicitly implements this human validation step; T017b only tests YOLO memory constraints.
FR-004 requires normality check (Shapiro-Wilk) and fallback to robust alternative if violated. No task implements the Shapiro-Wilk test or the fallback logic.

FR-005 requires Bonferroni correction for 3 pairwise comparisons. Task T034 implements this, but FR-005 also mandates a robust alternative (Wilcoxon) if normality is violated. No task covers the Wilcoxon fallback.

Edge Cases require post-hoc power analysis (G*Power equivalent) if sample size is low. Task T036 mentions pipeline validation, but no task explicitly implements the post-hoc power analysis with power <0.80 flagging.

Plan.md Phase 1/2 describes 'Manual Curation' of text narratives and image generation, while Spec.md FR-001/US-001 requires ingesting 'open visual datasets (e.g., Visual Genome)'. No task covers the spec's dataset ingestion pipeline; tasks assume manual curation or YOLO-based processing.

Task T015a states 'If ≥2 human annotators are not available, this task is BLOCKED'. This contradicts FR-008's requirement for ≥3 annotators. The blocking condition should reference the correct count (3) and the spec's exclusion criteria.
Task T029a documents ANOVA as primary and LMM as secondary, which contradicts FR-004. The documentation task should reflect the spec's LMM-primary requirement.
